---
title: "Data Exploration"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(gtsummary)
```

## Read Data

```{r}
#| label: read-data

# Clinical has a 2-row header: row 1 = section group labels (merged cells),
# row 2 = actual column names. Extract row 2 as col names, then read from row 3.
clinical_col_names <- read_excel(
  "raw-data/Clinical_and_Other_Features.xlsx",
  skip = 1, n_max = 1, col_names = FALSE
) |>
  unlist(use.names = FALSE)

clinical <- read_excel(
  "raw-data/Clinical_and_Other_Features.xlsx",
  skip = 2,
  col_names = clinical_col_names
)

imaging <- read_excel("raw-data/Imaging_Features.xlsx")
```

## Clinical & Other Features

```{r}
#| label: glimpse-clinical

glimpse(clinical)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-clinical
#| tbl-cap: "Clinical and Other Features Summary"

clinical |>
  tbl_summary()
```

## Imaging Features

```{r}
#| label: glimpse-imaging

glimpse(imaging)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-imaging
#| tbl-cap: "Imaging Features Summary"

imaging |>
  tbl_summary()
```
